Trace

Saudi-ready distributed observability, built on OpenTelemetry.

Trace is an integrated observability platform — logs, metrics, and traces — in one place, hosted inside the Kingdom.

Discover Trace

Key Features

OpenTelemetry-native

OTLP ingestion with no vendor lock-in — no proprietary agents.

Three Pillars Unified

Logs, metrics, and traces in one platform instead of three.

In-Kingdom Hosting

Data lives in OCI Jeddah — never crosses borders.

Multi-Tenant

Full per-customer isolation at the storage and query layer.

Smart Alerting

Customizable alerts via email, Slack, Teams, and Webhooks.

Trace performance dashboard
